scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path');function r(d){for(const n of f.readdirSync(d)){const t=p.join(d,n);if(f.statSync(t).isDirectory())r(t);else if(/\.(js|css|html|svg|json|woff2?)$/.test(n)){try{e('zstd -19 '+JSON.stringify(t)+' -o '+JSON.stringify(t+'.zst'),{stdio:'ignore'})}catch{}}}}r('build')"
